compile-errors.short_description: CGO link failed: cannot find -lXxf86vm on audit host
compile-errors.remediation: Install libxxf86vm-dev (Debian/Ubuntu) or equivalent X11 dev packages before Fyne+CGO builds; match CI apt list in .github/workflows/go.yml.

compile-errors.short_description: MinGW x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc not installed on audit host
compile-errors.remediation: Install mingw-w64 and set CC/CXX to the MinGW toolchain for Windows cross-builds from Linux.

compile-errors.short_description: Invalid cross: GOOS=darwin with mixed zgoos when forcing tags incorrectly; Darwin generally needs a macOS host with Apple clang for CGO+Fyne
compile-errors.remediation: Build darwin artifacts on macOS using task build:native:darwin (or local go build with CGO_ENABLED=1 and Xcode CLT).

test-notes.short_description: No *_test.go files found; go test passes vacuously with 0% statement coverage
test-notes.remediation: Add table-driven tests for domain services, storage adapters, API handlers, and config; gate merges on coverage thresholds.

lint-issues.short_description: ToggleDone/MarkDone/MarkUndone share duplicate PATCH handler bodies
lint-issues.remediation: Extract a private helper (e.g. patchNoteEndpoint) parameterized by path suffix and response mapping.

lint-issues.short_description: logger.Sync return not checked (comment claims ignore)
lint-issues.remediation: Assign to _ with nolint and rationale, or log Sync errors at shutdown.
Split registration, validation, and event-loop setup into smaller functions with early returns.
Introduce const goosWindows or use runtime.GOOS comparisons via a small helper.
Name return values for clarity (writers, closers, etc.).

lint-issues.short_description: GET/DELETE use nil body instead of http.NoBody
lint-issues.remediation: Use http.NoBody for requests with no payload.
Optional style fix: func(ctx context.Context, id, content string, done bool).

lint-issues.short_description: Same paramTypeCombine as API store UpdateNote
lint-issues.remediation: Align signatures with API layer if desired for consistency.

lint-issues.short_description: Exported JWTSecret field name matches secret pattern
lint-issues.remediation: Redact in logs, avoid printing config, document rotation; consider unexported field with accessor if feasible.

lint-issues.short_description: TLS InsecureSkipVerify may be true from config
lint-issues.remediation: Default false in production; warn at startup; document dev-only usage.
Validate base_url scheme/host allowlist; reject file:// and redirects to unexpected hosts.

lint-issues.short_description: err shadowing in decode blocks (multiple lines)
lint-issues.remediation: Use separate variable names (decodeErr) or inline without short := shadowing outer err.

wire-issues.short_description: wire_gen.go is gitignored via *_gen.go; CI and developers must regenerate before build
wire-issues.remediation: Keep go.yml wire step before compile; consider stop ignoring wire_gen.go if reproducible diffs are desired.

wire-issues.short_description: Linux vs Windows wire gen differs only in //go:generate tag hint line when comparing outputs
wire-issues.remediation: Document that release builds must run wire with the target OS tags (task build:wire:linux|windows).

cgo-issues.short_description: Desktop build requires CGO, X11/GL dev libs on Linux, MinGW on Windows cross-builds; hotkey package is linux||windows only
cgo-issues.remediation: Treat headless/CI as build-only with full apt deps; document WSL2 hotkey limitations per existing project docs.

static-api-audit.notes: No imports of unsafe, ioutil, or math/rand in application Go sources; prefer math/rand/v2 if cryptographically weak PRNG ever becomes a concern.

suggested-fixes.short_description: Wire CLI was not on PATH in audit environment
suggested-fixes.remediation: Use go run github.com/google/wire/cmd/wire@v0.7.0 (applied) so wire generation does not depend on a global install.
Deduplicate with a shared request helper to reduce drift and bug surface.

suggested-fixes.short_description: TLS InsecureSkipVerify and dynamic HTTP client usage
suggested-fixes.remediation: Harden TLS defaults; validate API base URL to mitigate SSRF/gosec findings.
Add tests starting with domain and storage layers; run go test -race in CI.
Refactor for readability and safer shutdown/error propagation.

gofix-captured.note: Initial go fix -diff (before wire_gen existed) failed on container.InitializeApp undefined; after wire gen, go fix ./... applied cleanly.
categories_applied: interface{} to any (logger, config, API store, JWT callback)
builtin min() for slice window in note_service
httpNoBody-related fixes not in go fix; handled separately by linter backlog
gofix-captured.artifact: Captured unified diff: docs/audit/go126-gofix-captured.diff (from first go fix -diff run before wire_gen existed); applied equivalents committed via go fix ./...

coverage.note: cover.out is gitignored by *.out; regenerate locally after adding tests.
